hero.prob_take: Stars bettors have stopped pushing at 56.5%, which means the crowd genuinely doesn't know who wins tonight, yet the 6.5-point move up in 24 hours suggests someone with information just loaded up on Dallas. daily_take.headline: Stars-Sabres Surge Signals Sharp Money Rotating Into Dallas
daily_take.deck: Dallas jumped 6.5 points overnight to 56.5%, driven by $432K in volume that screams coordinated action. The move tracks with Dallas getting healthier at exactly the right moment in the season, but the market's already priced in the narrative. Smart bettors should ask if the 56.5% line now overvalues a team that's merely back to "expected," not "exceptional." Fade the momentum.
